creator: jackiefros797@gmail.com
text: My mother is a very flirtatious woman who uses a lot of beauty products, among them the one she uses the most besides makeup is eyelash extensions. Her birthday will be coming up soon and I want to give her a gift that she really likes and that she knows that she really likes. It will use it, but I can't think of what it could be. Does anyone here have any ideas? And I also need you to recommend a store where I can get the product at an affordable price.
